svg.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
svg.title: Class Architecture Map
svg.desc: conceptual families with class inheritance and Rust composition called out explicitly
svg.text: conceptual families with class inheritance and Rust composition called out explicitly
PagedComposition and TokenPagedComposition are composition/paging primitives, not CompositeVM subclasses.
Use them beside CompositeVM or a filtered source; they do not alter the container hierarchy.
Helper boxes make interface and delegate endpoints explicit so wraps/decorates/adapts stay literal.
Class extends applies to class-based flavors; Rust composes the same families from ComponentCore and NotificationVm fields.
